strategy.name: CRUDE INTENTIONS — EMA Stack + RSI Reset + FVG Confluence
strategy.description: Four-layer confluence system. EMA stack defines trend regime. RSI reset confirms momentum exhaustion on pullback. FVG or key level provides structural entry point. VWAP and HTF structure provide volume and macro context. All layers must align. A+ confluence score minimum 7/10 before any entry fires. When in doubt — NO TRADE.

indicators.ema_20: Primary trend direction. Price pulling back to EMA20 in uptrend = long setup zone. Price rallying to EMA20 in downtrend = short setup zone.
indicators.ema_50: Intermediate trend confirmation. EMA20 > EMA50 = uptrend. EMA20 < EMA50 = downtrend. Mixed = no trade.
indicators.ema_200: Long-term regime filter. All EMAs stacked in same direction = highest conviction. EMA200 slope defines the macro tide.
indicators.rsi_14: Entry timing on 4H. 35-55 on pullback in uptrend = momentum reset, snap-back likely. 45-65 on rally in downtrend = momentum exhausted, rejection likely. Not just oversold/overbought — divergence matters.
indicators.fvg: Fair Value Gap zones. Unfilled 4H FVGs act as price magnets. Fresh gaps (under 25 bars) outperform old gaps. Gap + EMA + round level = triple confluence.
indicators.vwap: Volume-Weighted Average Price. Price above VWAP = institutional buyers in control. Price below VWAP = sellers in control. Long setups require price above VWAP or bouncing off VWAP from below. Short setups require price below VWAP or rejecting VWAP from above. VWAP + EMA20 confluence = highest conviction entry zone.
indicators.htf_structure: Higher Timeframe (Daily/Weekly) support and resistance levels. Entry must not be within 0.50 of a major HTF resistance level on longs, or HTF support level on shorts. A 4H pullback into EMA20 that is also sitting on a clean daily support is A+. The same setup approaching a weekly resistance ceiling is a problem — note and reduce size or skip.
indicators.ovx: Crude Oil Volatility Index. OVX > 35 = high vol regime, size down and widen stops. OVX > 50 = extreme, consider no trade.
indicators.dxy: US Dollar Index. CL and DXY are inversely correlated. Rising DXY = headwind for CL longs. Falling DXY = tailwind.
indicators.session: Trading session. NY open (9:30 AM - 12:00 PM ET) and London (3:00 - 11:00 AM ET) produce cleanest CL setups. Asia session = avoid new entries.

bullish: EMA20 > EMA50 AND EMA50 > EMA200 — full uptrend stack
Price above VWAP — institutional buyers in control
No major HTF resistance within 0.50 above price
bearish: EMA20 < EMA50 AND EMA50 < EMA200 — full downtrend stack
Price below VWAP — sellers in control
No major HTF support within 0.50 below price
neutral: EMA stack mixed — EMA20 between EMA50 and EMA200
Price chopping through EMA20 and VWAP repeatedly
EIA week with no clear directional setup
OVX above 50 — extreme volatility, stand aside
Price pinned between HTF support and resistance with no room to run

long: EMA20 > EMA50 > EMA200 — uptrend stack confirmed on 4H
RSI between 35-55 — pullback momentum reset, not oversold
Price at or within 0.20 of EMA20 or unfilled bullish FVG zone
Price at or above VWAP — or bouncing off VWAP as dynamic support
No major daily/weekly resistance within 0.50 above entry
Session is NY open (9:30 AM - 12 PM ET) or London (3 AM - 11 AM ET)
NOT within 3 hours of EIA release (Wednesday 10:30 AM ET)
A+ confluence score 7 or higher out of 10
short: EMA20 < EMA50 < EMA200 — downtrend stack confirmed on 4H
RSI between 45-65 — rally reset, not overbought
Price at or within 0.20 of EMA20 or unfilled bearish FVG zone
Price at or below VWAP — or rejecting VWAP as dynamic resistance
No major daily/weekly support within 0.50 below entry
Session is NY open (9:30 AM - 12 PM ET) or London (3 AM - 11 AM ET)
NOT within 3 hours of EIA release (Wednesday 10:30 AM ET)
A+ confluence score 7 or higher out of 10

aplus_checklist.description: Score 1 point for each. Minimum 7/10 to take the trade. 10/10 = full size. 7-8/10 = standard size. Below 7 = NO TRADE.
layer_1_trend: 4H EMA stack aligned — EMA20/50/200 all pointing same direction
Daily chart confirms — daily trend agrees with 4H bias
layer_2_momentum: RSI in reset zone — 35-55 for longs, 45-65 for shorts
MACD confirming — histogram turning in direction of trade
layer_3_structure: Price at key level — EMA20, FVG zone, or round dollar level
Risk/reward valid — minimum 2:1 to first target
layer_4_confirmation: Session timing — NY open or London, not Asia
EIA window clear — not within 3 hours of Wednesday 10:30 AM ET
layer_5_context: VWAP aligned — price above VWAP for longs, below for shorts. OR price bouncing off VWAP as dynamic support/resistance at entry zone
HTF structure clear — no major daily or weekly S/R level within 0.50 that would cap the trade before first target is reached

scoring.10_10: A+ — Full size, highest conviction, take the trade
scoring.8_9: A  — Standard size, take the trade
scoring.7_10: B+ — Standard to half size, take the trade if other factors clean
scoring.5_6: B  — Half size or skip — wait for better alignment
scoring.0_4: F  — NO TRADE — wait for better setup

vwap_rules.description: VWAP usage rules for CL 4H setups
long_rules: PASS: Price is above VWAP at time of entry evaluation
PASS: Price has pulled back to VWAP and is showing rejection (pin bar, engulfing) at VWAP level
CONDITIONAL: Price is slightly below VWAP but VWAP is sloping upward and converging with EMA20 — note and reduce conviction
FAIL: Price is well below VWAP with no sign of reclamation — do not fight the institutional order flow
short_rules: PASS: Price is below VWAP at time of entry evaluation
PASS: Price has rallied to VWAP and is showing rejection (pin bar, engulfing) at VWAP level
CONDITIONAL: Price is slightly above VWAP but VWAP is sloping downward and converging with EMA20 — note and reduce conviction
FAIL: Price is well above VWAP — do not fade strong institutional buying
confluence_notes: VWAP + EMA20 within 0.15 of each other = extremely high conviction entry zone
VWAP + FVG overlap = institutional level with structural gap — highest priority
VWAP rejection on volume spike = strongest signal — confirms institutional participation

htf_structure_rules.description: Higher timeframe level rules — daily and weekly S/R must be checked before entry
how_to_identify: Daily swing highs and lows from the last 20 sessions
Weekly open, high, low, close levels
Prior consolidation zones (3+ daily candles in same range)
Round dollar levels ($75, $76, $77... etc) — always note these
Prior FVG zones on the daily chart — unfilled daily FVGs are magnets
long_rules: PASS: Entry is at or above a clear daily support level — adds conviction
PASS: No major daily or weekly resistance within 0.50 above entry
CONDITIONAL: Daily resistance 0.50-1.00 above entry — note and ensure R/R still valid to first target before that level
FAIL: Major weekly or daily resistance within 0.50 above entry — trade is capped, skip or wait for breakout
short_rules: PASS: Entry is at or below a clear daily resistance level — adds conviction
PASS: No major daily or weekly support within 0.50 below entry
CONDITIONAL: Daily support 0.50-1.00 below entry — note and ensure R/R still valid to first target before that level
FAIL: Major weekly or daily support within 0.50 below entry — trade is floored, skip or wait for breakdown

exit_rules: Take profit 1: 1.5R from entry — move stop to breakeven after hitting
Take profit 2: 2.5R from entry — trail stop behind EMA20
Stop loss: 5 ticks beyond FVG zone bottom (longs) or top (shorts)
Hard stop maximum: 40 ticks ($400/contract) — never exceed
Time-based: close before EIA window if trade is open on Wednesday morning
Invalidation exit: if price closes 4H candle on wrong side of EMA20 — close immediately
VWAP invalidation: if price closes 4H candle decisively on wrong side of VWAP — reassess and consider closing

fvg_rules.description: Fair Value Gap hierarchy and trading rules
gap_hierarchy: FVG at round dollar level ($78, $79, $80) = highest priority
FVG that coincides with VWAP = institutional + structural confluence = A+ zone
FVG at daily S/R level = HTF + structural confluence = A+ zone
Fresh gap under 25 bars > old gap over 75 bars
Large gap over 0.30 > small gap under 0.10
entry_conditions: Price approaching unfilled FVG from outside
Gap must be unmitigated — price has not traded through it since creation
Prefer gaps where candle 1 and candle 3 show clear institutional participation
Enter at top of bearish FVG (longs) or bottom of bullish FVG (shorts)
Highest conviction: FVG + EMA20 + VWAP all within 0.20 of each other
invalidation: Gap fully filled and price continues through — wait for next gap
Gap older than 100 bars — reduce confidence weighting
Conflicting FVG in same direction within 0.50 — wait for clarity

risk_rules: Maximum 1% of Apex account per trade — hard rule, no exceptions
CL tick value $10 per 0.01 move — 20-tick stop = $200/contract
Size DOWN when OVX > 35 — reduce to half normal contracts
Size DOWN when trading against daily trend — reduce to half
Size DOWN when score is 7/10 — standard to half size only
Full size only at 9-10/10 score with VWAP and HTF both passing
Maximum 3 trades per day on CL
No trading after 3 consecutive losses — 60 minute mandatory pause
No trading after Apex daily loss limit is 80% reached
Never hold through EIA without intentional size reduction
Never add to a losing position
Paper trade minimum 2 weeks before any automation goes live

preferred.london_open: 3:00 AM - 11:00 AM ET — clean directional moves, good FVG fills
preferred.ny_open: 9:30 AM - 12:00 PM ET — highest volume, best momentum setups, VWAP most reliable

avoid.asia: Before 3:00 AM ET — low volume, choppy, fake breakouts, VWAP unreliable
avoid.lunch: 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM ET — low volume, avoid new entries
avoid.eia_window: Wednesday 7:30 AM - 1:30 PM ET — extreme volatility risk

macro_filters.weekly_bias: Run market-environment-strategist agent every Sunday 8 PM ET
macro_filters.eia_protocol: Run Prompt 4 every Wednesday at 10:35 AM ET after data drops
macro_filters.cot_protocol: Run Prompt 7 every Friday after COT data releases
macro_filters.ovx_check: Check OVX before every session — size rules above apply
macro_filters.dxy_check: Check DXY trend before any CL long — headwind or tailwind?
macro_filters.vwap_check: Note VWAP level at session open — is price above or below? Sets the directional bias for the session.
macro_filters.htf_check: Mark daily swing highs/lows and weekly levels on chart every Sunday — update if a major level is breached during the week

eia_inventory.rule: No new entries within 3 hours either side

baker_hughes.rule: Be aware, size down if trading near release

fomc.rule: Go flat or reduce size day of decision

cpi.rule: No new entries within 2 hours of release

opec_meeting.rule: No new entries day before or day of

apex_compliance._description: Apex 4.0 compliance and pre-trade drawdown shield. These rules run BEFORE the A+ checklist — a perfect setup still gets blocked if the account cannot survive the worst-case path.

drawdown_shield._concept: Before entering any trade, calculate the worst-case drawdown path — not just this trade but the sequence of trades that could follow. The account must be able to absorb the full worst-case chain without breaching MLL.

step_1_current_cushion.note: MLL trails upward with peak balance (EOD model) — recalculate after every session close

step_2_worst_case_trade_risk.note: Always use your hard stop, not your intended stop. CL gaps through levels.

step_3_consecutive_loss_exposure._concept: The real Apex killer is not one losing trade — it is 3-4 consecutive losses eroding the cushion to breach territory.

thresholds.5_or_more: GREEN — full normal sizing, proceed if setup qualifies
thresholds.3_to_4: YELLOW — reduce to half size, tighten stop criteria, no B-grade setups
thresholds.2: ORANGE — minimum size only (1 contract), A+ setups only (8/10 minimum), no countertrend
thresholds.1: RED — DO NOT TRADE. One max-stop loss ends the account. Stand aside until session reset or account rebuild.
thresholds.0: BREACH IMMINENT — account is already at or below MLL. Stop trading immediately.

step_4_daily_loss_limit_remaining._concept: EOD accounts have a session circuit breaker. Track daily PnL separately from the cushion calculation.

thresholds.500_to_1000: YELLOW — size down, no more than 1 contract per trade
thresholds.under_500: RED — stand aside, not worth risking the day session lock
thresholds.at_limit: LOCKED — no new entries until next session

cutoff_rules.before_1430_ET: Normal trading window — full rules apply
cutoff_rules.1430_to_1600_ET: Late session — reduce size by half, only highest conviction setups
cutoff_rules.1600_to_1630_ET: WARNING zone — no new entries unless already in a winning trade managing exit
cutoff_rules.after_1630_ET: HARD BLOCK — no new entries under any circumstances.

step_6_compounded_position_check.rule: Total open risk across all positions must never exceed 50% of current cushion
step_6_compounded_position_check.example: Cushion $2,000 → max total open risk = $1,000 across all contracts

pre_trade_gate_sequence._description: Run in this order before any entry. A BLOCK at any step = NO TRADE regardless of setup quality.
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_1: Is current_balance above MLL + $500 buffer? (BLOCK if no)
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_2: Calculate trades_to_breach — is it 2 or above? (BLOCK if 1 or 0)
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_3: Is DLL remaining above $500? (BLOCK if no, EOD accounts only)
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_4: Is current time before 4:30 PM ET? (BLOCK if no)
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_5: Does total open risk (existing + new) stay under 50% of cushion? (BLOCK if no)
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_6: Is trades_to_breach 3 or less? (REDUCE SIZE to 1 contract and require 8/10 minimum)
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_7: Run A+ confluence checklist — minimum 7/10 to proceed
pre_trade_gate_sequence.gate_8: Run Prompt 11 adversarial scanner — PASS or CONDITIONAL PASS required

mll_tracking.eod_model: MLL updates once per day at market close based on peak closing balance
mll_tracking.record_keeping: Log balance and MLL every session close in trade_ledger.db
mll_tracking.after_profit_day: If today's close sets a new balance high → MLL moves up overnight → recalculate cushion next morning
mll_tracking.after_loss_day: MLL does not move down — cushion shrinks by exactly the day's loss
mll_tracking.never_assume: Always verify current MLL before session open — do not rely on memory

legacy_rules.daily_loss_limit: Respect at all times — system halts at 80% of limit
legacy_rules.max_contracts: Size per vol-targeting formula — never exceed contract limits
legacy_rules.no_revenge_trading: After a stop out — wait minimum 30 minutes before re-analyzing
legacy_rules.no_averaging_down: If stopped out, the setup is invalidated — wait for a new one
legacy_rules.consistency_rule: Same rules every day — no exception for obvious setups

notes: v1.4 — Added VWAP alignment and HTF structure as Layer 5 of the A+ checklist. Expanded checklist from 8 to 10 points. Raised minimum to trade from 6/8 to 7/10. Updated entry rules, bias criteria, FVG hierarchy, and risk rules to incorporate VWAP and HTF context. Added vwap_rules and htf_structure_rules sections. v1.3 — Full Drawdown Shield system. v1.2 — FVG gap status. v1.1 — vol-targeting position sizing.
